title: allosorus coriifolius
intro: Allosorus coriifolius, also known as the Cottongrass or Cotton Grass, is a species of fern-like flowering plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Allosorus coriifolius include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing respiratory tract irritations. Allosorus coriifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
